code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Infra_IngressController] --> PENDING: Invoice Created

    PENDING --> PROCESSING: Payment Initiated
    PENDING --> CANCELLED: User Cancelled
    PENDING --> EXPIRED: Timeout Reached

    PROCESSING --> COMPLETED: Payment Verified
    PROCESSING --> FAILED: Payment Error

    FAILED --> PENDING: Retry Payment

    COMPLETED --> PARTIALLY_REFUNDED: Partial Refund
    COMPLETED --> REFUNDED: Full Refund

    PARTIALLY_REFUNDED --> REFUNDED: Remaining Refund

    CANCELLED --> [Infra_LoadBalancer]
    EXPIRED --> [Infra_EtcdCluster]
    REFUNDED --> [Infra_IngressController]

    note right of PENDING
        Invoice awaiting payment
        Valid for 1 hour (Infra_WorkerNode)
    end note

    note right of PROCESSING
        Payment being verified
        Transaction in progress
    end note

    note right of COMPLETED
        Payment successful
        Preimage verified
    end note

    note right of FAILED
        Payment failed
        Retryable errors can
        transition back to PENDING
    end note

    note right of REFUNDED
        Full or partial refund
        completed
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个发票支付的状态流转图，核心流程是从PENDING到PROCESSING再到COMPLETED，但失败和取消的边界情况也要覆盖。起点我想放在Infra_IngressController，表示请求入口。
明白，起点是Infra_IngressController。PENDING之后除了正常支付，还有哪些终止路径？比如用户主动取消或者超时？
对，PENDING有三个出口：支付进入PROCESSING，用户取消到CANCELLED，超时到EXPIRED。另外PROCESSING失败后要能回到PENDING重试，这个很重要。
好的，我先把主干画出来：Infra_IngressController到PENDING，然后PENDING分支到PROCESSING、CANCELLED、EXPIRED。PROCESSING分出COMPLETED和FAILED，FAILED再连回PENDING。
COMPLETED之后还有退款逻辑，要能部分退款和全额退款。PARTIALLY_REFUNDED之后如果继续退，要走到REFUNDED。最后REFUNDED要回到Infra_IngressController闭环。
CANCELLED和EXPIRED这两个终止态需要连到基础设施节点吗？比如负载均衡或者etcd？
是的，CANCELLED连到Infra_LoadBalancer做流量回收，EXPIRED连到Infra_EtcdCluster做状态清理。另外给几个关键状态加注释说明，比如PENDING要标注1小时有效期，关联Infra_WorkerNode。
完成。PENDING、PROCESSING、COMPLETED、FAILED、REFUNDED都加了右侧注释，PENDING标注了1小时有效期和Infra_WorkerNode关联。所有基础设施连接和退款流转都画好了。
